title: Josen Shire
content:
{{Top|leg|notoc=1}} {{Character |type= |image=[[File:Josen.jpg]] |name=Josen Shire |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]"[[The Serpent Masters]]" |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Gray]] |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You're Tanith's father?"
"We crashed on this arid rock long ago, and were taken prisoner by the Serpent Masters.|Luke Skywalker meets Josen Shire|}} '''Josen Shire''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] of the [[Serpent Masters]] of [[Ophideraan]] during the era of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and the father of [[Tanith Shire]]. Shire and his daughter crash-landed on Ophideraan a number of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] before [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] and forced into servitude by the Serpent Masters, a clan of [[Flying serpent|lizard]]-riding bandits who ruled the barren [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. After some years toiling to maintain the planet's [[Great Well]], Shire's daughter Tanith—who was allowed to work offworld, steering salvage wrecks towards Ophideraan—returned with [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agent [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in tow. Shire became acquainted with the young [[The Force/Legends|Force-user]] during his time on Ophideraan, and ran interference for Skywalker as he worked to overthrow the Serpent Masters and free those they subjugated. ==Behind the scenes== Josen Shire first appeared in ''[[The Serpent Masters]]'', a story arc of the the [[Star Wars (comic strip)|''Star Wars'' comic strip]] written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and released in [[1981]], where he was illustrated by [[Al Williamson]]. Although Shire goes unnamed in his initial appearance, his first name was later given in his daughter Tanith's [[Databank (original)|Databank]] entry.{{DB|character|tanithshire|Shire, Tanith}} ==Appearances== *"[[The Serpent Masters]]" {{Reprint|The Serpent Masters}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{FactFile|60|TAN 1-4|Tanith Shire}} *{{DB|character|tanithshire|Shire, Tanith}} {{1stID|Josen Shire}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Josen Shire }} [[Category:Humans|Shire, Josen]] [[Category:Males|Shire, Josen]]
